name: Honey Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pastry with 1 tablespoon each of sugar and flour.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining sugar, flour, honey, and cream. Stir until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture over the apples in a large bowl. Mix gently until the apple slices are well coated.
4. Spoon the apples into the pie shell. Dust with cinnamon and nutmeg; dot with butter.
5. Bake at 375°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
